in_reply_to_context: reply to @codex question issue comment 4951710032 on the same PR (no API in_reply_to field; issue comments are flat)
body:
### Summary
* Answered the follow-up: **def-A is canonical** for future p95 ≤ 2h cadence measurements — catch latency ends when the wake/sweep reads the trigger into the coordinator seat. [sims/verdict-014-routine-cadence-economics/README.mdL49-L57](https://github.com/menno420/sim-lab/blob/477b452c2e70b7e5a6c7e981eab8b2bb97bd497a/sims/verdict-014-routine-cadence-economics/README.md#L49-L57)
* Documented that def-B / done-when evidence should be tracked separately as `catch-to-evidence`, and only promoted into the SLO if the owner explicitly funds the failsafe-1h cost upgrade. [sims/verdict-014-routine-cadence-economics/REPORT.mdL226-L234](https://github.com/menno420/sim-lab/blob/477b452c2e70b7e5a6c7e981eab8b2bb97bd497a/sims/verdict-014-routine-cadence-economics/REPORT.md#L226-L234)
* Updated the consuming decision and paste-ready VERDICT 014 disposition to reflect that def-A is the canonical cadence metric, while def-B remains a sensitivity/cost tradeoff. [sims/verdict-014-routine-cadence-economics/REPORT.mdL235-L240](https://github.com/menno420/sim-lab/blob/477b452c2e70b7e5a6c7e981eab8b2bb97bd497a/sims/verdict-014-routine-cadence-economics/REPORT.md#L235-L240) [sims/verdict-014-routine-cadence-economics/REPORT.mdL280-L281](https://github.com/menno420/sim-lab/blob/477b452c2e70b7e5a6c7e981eab8b2bb97bd497a/sims/verdict-014-routine-cadence-economics/REPORT.md#L280-L281)
* Committed the changes on the current branch: `5d5caff verdict-014: canonicalize cadence catch metric`.
* Created the PR via `make_pr` with title: `verdict-014: canonicalize cadence catch metric`.

**Testing**
* ✅ `python3 sims/verdict-014-routine-cadence-economics/cadence_economics_sim.py`
* ✅ `git diff --check`

 [View task →](https://chatgpt.com/s/cd_6a53b19025448191b3f9ca6758aa8555)
